tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List the AI models available on 370.ai (chat / image / video / audio). Free, no billing.

tools.name: chat
tools.description:
Ask any text/chat model on 370.ai (Claude / GPT / Gemini / DeepSeek / Qwen / ...) and get its reply.

    Use this when you want a **specific or different** model than your own — e.g. consult Claude while you run on
    GPT, use a cheaper model for bulk work, or reach a model you don't have direct a

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description:
Generate an image from a text prompt. Use whenever the user wants a picture/illustration/photo created.

    Args:
        prompt: description of the image (English works best).
        size: 1024x1024 (square) / 1024x1536 (portrait) / 1536x1024 (landscape).
    Returns the generated PNG image.

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description:
Start a text-to-video generation (async). Returns a task_id; poll get_video_status until done.

    Args:
        prompt: description of the video.
        duration: seconds (e.g. 5).
        resolution: 480p / 720p / 1080p.

tools.name: get_video_status
tools.description: Check a video generation task. When status=succeeded the result contains the video url.

tools.name: text_to_speech
tools.description: Convert text to spoken audio (mp3). Returns a status with byte size.

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.description: Transcribe spoken audio (from a public URL) to text.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "chat" is 802 chars, far longer than this server's median (88). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.
